title: The Education of Henry Adams
author: Henry Adams
content: “Chaos was the law of nature; Order was the dream of man.”
action: Accept that systems require active maintenance to resist entropy.

title: The Sound and the Fury
author: William Faulkner
content: “Clocks slay time... time is dead as long as it is being clicked off by little wheels.”
action: Focus on the substance of your work, not just the duration.

title: Song of Myself
author: Walt Whitman
content: “I have heard what the talkers were talking, the talk of the beginning and the end, but I do not talk of the beginning or the end.”
action: Ignore speculative noise and focus on the immediate present.

title: Death of a Salesman
author: Arthur Miller
content: “You can't eat the orange and throw the peel away—a man is not a piece of fruit.”
action: Ensure you are treated as a participant, not a consumable resource.

title: The Lost Steps
author: Alejo Carpentier
content: “To inhabit the present is to live in a continuous state of creation.”
action: Define your current activity as an act of invention.
